title: Workhorse Group and Motiv Electric Trucks Complete Merger
text: Workhorse Group and Motiv Electric Trucks completed their merger on December 15, 2025, creating a leading North American manufacturer of medium-duty electric trucks and buses. The combined company is valued at about $105 million. Upon closing, Motiv's controlling investor owns approximately 62.5% of the combined company, while Workhorse shareholders own approximately 26.5% and Workhorse's existing senior secured lender has rights to receive common stock representing approximately 11%. Motiv's legacy controlling investor provided Workhorse with up to $50 million in new debt financing capacity, with approximately $10 million available in a revolving credit facility. The companies expect to achieve at least $20 million of cost synergies through research and development, general and administrative, and facility cost-reductions by the end of 2026. The combined company has scalable manufacturing capabilities, advanced and road-tested products, and successfully developed commercial relationships with 10 of the largest commercial truck fleets in North America.
